game_info.title: Temple Escape 3D
game_info.concept:
The Original Endless Running Adventure!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/temple-run/id420009108

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

The Original Endless Running Adventure!
Experience the thrill of Temple Run – the global phenomenon that redefined mobile gaming!
Steal the cursed idol and escape from the relentless Demon Monkeys in a heart-pounding adventure through ancient temples, jungle ruins, and precarious cliff edges.
Outrun danger in the ultimate maze-running, jungle-escaping, temple adventure!

- Swipe to turn, jump, and slide past deadly obstacles
- Race through temples, bridges, and treacherous paths
- Collect coins, unlock diverse characters, and boost your power-ups
- Test your reflexes in a fast and frenzied experience
- Challenge friends & climb the leaderboards

"Temple Run is that heart-pounding action movie moment – but non-stop!” – SlideToPlay
"One of the most thrilling and fun running games ever!" – TheAppera
"A fast and frenzied experience." – IGN
"Very addicting… a truly different running game!" – Appolicious

Join over 50 MILLION players worldwide in this legendary treasure-hunting escape!

Download now and see how far you can run!
game_info.description: Temple Escape 3D is a fast-paced endless runner where you must outrun a demonic entity while navigating a treacherous ancient stone pathway. Dodge obstacles, jump over fire pits, slide under hanging vines, and collect cursed gold coins to increase your score. The further you run, the faster the game becomes!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / A: Move Left
- Arrow Right / D: Move Right
- Arrow Up / W / Space: Jump
- Arrow Down / S / Shift: Slide / Crouch
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause Game
- R: Restart Game (on Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic movement and collision detection functionality.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test AI will constantly trigger "Move Right" and "Move Left" actions while periodically jumping. This checks if the player entity responds to inputs and if the physics system correctly detects ground collisions and boundary limits.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should run for at least 10 seconds without crashing. The player should change lanes visually. Eventually, the player will likely hit an obstacle due to random movement, triggering the GAME_OVER_LOSE state, confirming collision detection works.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify gameplay logic, scoring, and extended playability.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The test AI will scan the "lanes" ahead for obstacles. If an obstacle is detected, it will choose a safe lane or perform the required action (Jump for low obstacles, Slide for high ones). It aims to survive as long as possible.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should survive significantly longer than random movement (e.g., > 30 seconds). The score should increase as distance is covered and coins are collected. The game speed should visibly increase over time.
